title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Piramal Pharma Global Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Piramal Pharma Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Piramal Pharma Global Group has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Piramal Pharma Global Group:
Piramal Pharma Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma Global Group!
